name: COM Hijacking via Sdclt
notes:
This rule detects potential COM hijacking via Sdclt.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Omkar Gudhate
SIGMA Title: COM Hijack via Sdclt
SIGMA Description: Detects changes to 'HKCU\Software\Classes\Folder\shell\open\command\DelegateExecute'


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") == 'hkcu\\software\\classes\\folder\\shell\\open\\command\\delegateexecute' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY COM Hijacking via Sdclt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") == 'hkcu\\software\\classes\\folder\\shell\\open\\command\\delegateexecute' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: COM Hijacking via Sdclt
Event description: Detects potential COM hijacking via Sdclt.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
